about.subtitle: Version info and project links
about.title: About
app.title: AiDog
appLog.desc: Console logs are always output; settings below only affect log files
appLog.title: Application Log
codingTools.applyPlugin.desc: Writes primaryApiKey="any" into ~/.claude/config.json so the VS Code Claude Code extension routes through the local proxy. Off removes the field.
codingTools.applyPlugin.title: Apply to Claude Code Plugin
codingTools.errorHint: Please check the file's JSON format and read/write permissions, then retry.
codingTools.introDesc: These toggles write to the Claude Code CLI local config files, routing the extension and CLI through aidog and skipping first-run onboarding.
codingTools.skipOnboarding.desc: Writes hasCompletedOnboarding=true into the root object of ~/.claude.json to skip the Claude Code first-run onboarding. Off removes the field.
codingTools.skipOnboarding.title: Skip Claude Code Onboarding
codex.title: Codex Config
env.ANTHROPIC_AWS_API_KEY.desc: Claude Platform on AWS workspace key
env.ANTHROPIC_CUSTOM_HEADERS.desc: Name: Value format, multiple separated by newline
env.CLAUDE_AUTOCOMPACT_PCT_OVERRIDE.desc: Context capacity percentage that triggers auto-compaction (1-100)
env.CLAUDE_AUTO_BACKGROUND_TASKS.desc: Automatically move long-running subagents to background
env.CLAUDE_CODE_ATTRIBUTION_HEADER.desc: Omit attribution block from system prompt, improves agent caching
env.CLAUDE_CODE_AUTO_COMPACT_WINDOW.desc: Context tokens used for autocompact calculation
env.CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_ADAPTIVE_THINKIN: Fall back to fixed thinking budget
env.CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_NONESSENTIAL_TRA: Disable auto-update, feedback, error reporting, telemetry
env.CLAUDE_CODE_EFFORT_LEVEL.desc: Set effort level for supported models
env.CLAUDE_CODE_SKIP_BEDROCK_AUTH.desc: Skip AWS authentication (when using LLM gateway)
env.MAX_MCP_OUTPUT_TOKENS.desc: Maximum tokens of MCP tool response
env.MAX_THINKING_TOKENS.desc: Extended thinking token budget, 0 disables thinking
group.deletePlatformConfirm: "{{name}}" belongs only to this group. Removing it will permanently delete the platform and all its associations. This cannot be undone. Delete it?
group.dragPlatform: Drag to reorder / move to another group
group.groupKeyHint: Group key (= API Key / routing identity). Auto-generated if empty; locked after creation.
group.groupKeyLocked: Group key is locked after creation and cannot be modified
group.isDefaultTitle: Default group: config merged into ~/.claude/settings.json + ~/.codex/config.toml (Codex needs export AIDOG_KEY=<group key>)
group.mappingsHint: Map source model names to specific models on the target platform
group.name: Group Name
group.platformsHint: Select and reorder platforms for this group; order defines priority
group.routingModeDesc.failover: Pick platforms by ascending priority, falling back one by one on failure.
group.routingModeDesc.health_aware: Remove tripped platforms, then weighted random among healthy ones.
group.routingModeDesc.least_latency: Prefer the fastest platform by ascending average latency.
group.routingModeDesc.load_balance: Weighted random distribution across available platforms.
group.routingModeDesc.sticky: Bind a session to one platform; fall back to weighted random when unavailable or tripped.
group.purgeDisabledConfirm: This will clean up disabled (auto-disabled) platforms in this group: exclusive ones are permanently deleted, shared ones are only removed from this group. Continue?
group.testAll: Test all platforms in this group
home.desc: Proxy status, today's usage, and group/platform overview
importExport.ccswitch.desc: Read local cc-switch config (claude + codex providers only), auto-detect platform type by base_url. Selective import + per-item conflict decision.
importExport.ccswitch.groupAssignHint: Which groups these platforms join after import (batch, applies to all imported platforms)
importExport.ccswitch.nothingSelected: Nothing to import (all skipped or none selected)
importExport.ccswitch.title: Import from cc-switch
importExport.sub2api.title: Import from sub2api
importExport.sub2api.desc: Import the account-data JSON exported from the sub2api admin panel (only platform / base_url / api_key). Import always creates new platforms; it never overwrites by name.
importExport.sub2api.pastePlaceholder: Paste the JSON text exported from sub2api…
importExport.sub2api.emptyInput: Please paste or select a sub2api export JSON first
importExport.exportDesc: Select what to export; it is encrypted into a single .aidogx file (key hidden inside, unreadable to humans).
importExport.importDesc: Pick a .aidogx file; it's auto-decrypted. Decide each conflict; Skills auto-install with original enable state.
lang.label: Language
logs.clearConfirm: Clear all logs? This cannot be undone.
mcp.deleteConfirm: Removes "{{name}}" from DB + all enabled agent configs. Irreversible.
mcp.empty: No MCP yet. Click "Scan & Import" to pull from agent configs.
mcp.field.name: Name
mcp.maskedHint: Unchanged: enter *** to keep the original secret
mcp.resyncHint: Rewrite all enabled agent config files from the aidog database, fixing entries polluted by external tools
mcp.scanEmpty: No MCP found in either agent config.
mcp.subtitle: {{count}} servers
mcp.title: MCP
middleware.configHint.sensitive_word: Sensitive-word config may stay empty {}; pattern is the word.
middleware.globalRulesHint: Global rules apply to all groups/platforms and can be overridden by group/platform-level rules (nearest wins)
middleware.groupRulesHint: Apply to this group only, overriding global rules of the same type
middleware.masterToggleDesc: When off, all rules are bypassed; requests/responses skip middleware processing
middleware.name: Rule Name
middleware.patternHint: Match pattern / target path / header name
middleware.platformRulesHint: Apply to this platform only, overriding group/global rules of the same type
notif.defaultHooksDesc: When enabled, all groups automatically get Claude Code hooks and Codex notify, no per-group manual injection needed
notif.defaultHooksOff: Notification hooks removed from all groups
notif.defaultHooksOn: Notification hooks injected for all groups
notif.defaultHooksTitle: Inject Notification Hooks for All Groups by Default
notif.eventListDesc: Configure each Claude Code hook event individually: whether to trigger, which notification type, and an optional custom message (leave blank to use the type's template). Only a curated set is enabled by default.
notif.eventTemplatePlaceholder: Leave blank to use the selected type's template
notif.hookDesc: Inject notification hooks into Claude Code / Codex config; fires on task complete and waiting for input
notif.masterToggleDesc: When off, all notification dispatch is bypassed
notif.permGuideDesc: You may need to allow aidog to send notifications in System Settings.
notif.retentionDesc: History older than the retention period is permanently deleted; off keeps it forever
notif.templatePlaceholder: Leave empty to use the built-in default template
notif.ttsToggleDesc: Read out notification content per type when enabled
notif.uvInstallFailed: uv install failed; falling back to python3
notif.uvModalDesc: Notification hook scripts are Python (PEP723). Running them with uv is recommended for dependency isolation. Install uv automatically? Otherwise system python3 will be used.
platform.apiKeyOptional: API Key (optional, leave empty for passthrough)
platform.purgeDisabledConfirm: This will permanently delete all disabled (auto-disabled) platforms across the library. This cannot be undone. Continue?
platform.breakerDesc: Temporarily remove this platform after consecutive failures reach the threshold; recover via half-open probes after cooldown. Leave empty to inherit the global defaults from System Settings.
platform.empty: No platforms yet. Click above to add one.
platform.endpointsHint: Additional protocols this platform supports with different base URLs
platform.fillAllHint: Overwrite all slots with the default model
platform.groupAssignDesc: Create a default group and join other existing groups at the same time; selecting none means the platform belongs to no group.
platform.manualBudgetDesc: This platform has no upstream quota lookup. Set one or more manual budget limits, decremented by estimated usage; when any is exhausted forwarding stops (returns 402), and resumes automatically after the window/next day resets.
platform.manualBudgetEmpty: No limits yet. Click "Add limit" to configure.
platform.name: Platform Name
platform.newapiBalanceHint: Requires a separate token (from dashboard) to query balance
platform.passthroughBaseUrlHint: Enter host root (e.g. https://api.anthropic.com). Passthrough forwards original path/query directly, do not include version prefix.
platform.passthroughNote: Passthrough: client headers (including OAuth) and body are forwarded as-is. aidog performs no conversion or auth injection. API Key can be empty.
platform.paste.hint: Paste shared text to auto-detect Base URL, platform and API Key (base64 auto-decoded).
platform.paste.noPlatform: No built-in platform matched; current selection is kept.
platform.paste.title: Smart Detect
platform.protocolLocked: Protocol cannot be changed after creation
popover.desc: Content of the popover shown on left-clicking the tray icon. Toggle visibility, drag to reorder, add or remove items.
popover.title: Popover Display
pricing.empty: No pricing data yet. Click "Sync Now" to fetch from GitHub
pricing.syncDesc: Sync model pricing + max_tokens from GitHub (incl. per-platform prices)
pricing.syncResult: Sync complete: +{added} added, ~{updated} updated, {failed} failed ({total} total)
proxy.autolaunchDesc: Launch AiDog automatically when you log in
proxy.autostartDesc: Start proxy automatically on app launch
proxy.bindLanDesc: Allow other devices on the same local network to connect to this proxy (when off, only this machine can connect)
proxy.bindLanApplied: LAN access setting updated (proxy restarted automatically if running)
proxy.configDesc: Set this environment variable in Claude Code to route requests through this proxy.
proxy.dnsOverProxyDesc: SOCKS5h: resolve DNS through the proxy
proxy.logRequestsDesc: Record request headers, body, duration and token usage
proxy.logUpstreamReqDesc: Request headers and body sent to the upstream platform
proxy.logUserReqDesc: Request headers and body sent by the client
proxy.silentLaunchDesc: Start hidden in system tray without showing the main window
proxy.timeoutDesc: System default timeouts; group and model levels can override
proxy.upstreamProxyDesc: Configure HTTP/SOCKS5 proxy for all upstream platform requests
scheduling.breakerDefaultsDesc: Default breaker thresholds used when a platform does not override them (empty / 0).
scheduling.defaultRoutingModeDesc: Global default strategy used when a group does not specify its own.
scheduling.masterToggleDesc: When off, the breaker is bypassed: failing platforms are no longer temporarily removed.
settings.backup.desc: Automatically export all data as encrypted .aidogx at a set interval. Saved to ~/.aidog/backups/, expired files auto-cleaned.
settings.backup.title: Scheduled Backup
settings.dbCompactHint: Full VACUUM; proxy requests will briefly queue during compaction
settings.desc: Manage Claude Code global settings (fully aligned with official docs)
settings.editor.dirHint: Type ~/ to browse home directory, Tab to complete
settings.editor.dirOrInputPh: Choose a directory or type a path…
settings.editor.dirOrPathPh: Choose a directory or type a path…
settings.editor.fileHint: Type a path to browse files, e.g. ~/ or ./
settings.editor.fileOrInputPh: Choose a file or type a path…
settings.hooks.commandPh:
Command or script path, e.g. ./scripts/check.sh
Multi-line commands supported, each line runs independently
settings.hooks.deleteEvent: Delete all hooks for this event
settings.hooks.event.ConfigChange.desc: Triggered when a config file changes
settings.hooks.event.CwdChanged.desc: Triggered when the working directory changes
settings.hooks.event.FileChanged.desc: Triggered when a watched file changes
settings.hooks.event.PreToolUse.desc: Triggered before tool use, can block
settings.hooks.event.SessionStart.desc: Triggered on session start or resume
settings.hooks.event.UserPromptSubmit.de: Triggered when the user submits a prompt
settings.hooks.introLine1: Hooks automatically run commands/HTTP requests/LLM prompts at specific points in the Claude Code lifecycle.
settings.hooks.introLine2: Select an event type to start configuring.
settings.hooks.matcherToolPh: Tool name or regex, separate multiple with |
settings.hooks.promptPh:
Prompt text, use $ARGUMENTS to insert hook input data
Multi-line prompt content supported
settings.hooksNotifyInjected: Claude Code completion/waiting notification hooks injected; applies to all groups after saving.
settings.hooksQuickDesc: Fill in the Claude Code completion/waiting notification hooks in one click; applies to all groups and Codex after saving.
settings.perm.mode_acceptEdits_desc: Automatically accept file edits and common filesystem commands within the working directory
settings.perm.mode_bypassPermissions_des: Skip all permission prompts (root deletions still prompt)
settings.perm.mode_default_desc: Prompt for permission the first time each tool is used
settings.perm.mode_dontAsk_desc: Tools not pre-approved are automatically denied
settings.perm.mode_plan_desc: Read-only — read files and run read-only commands, no source edits
settings.perm.noRulesSuffix: rules yet. Add one using the input below.
settings.perm.syntax_Edit: Edit(path) — same path rules as Read
settings.perm.syntax_Read: Read(path) — // absolute / ~/ home / / project root / ./ current
settings.platformConfigHint: Edit JSON config. Fields different from global will be saved as overrides.
settings.plugins.localPathPh: Local install path (leave empty to auto-manage)
settings.plugins.marketplacesHint: Named marketplace source definitions (github / git / directory / settings)
settings.sandbox.deniedDomainsPh: Blocked even if allowedDomains wildcards permit
settings.sandbox.disabledHint: Once enabled, every Bash command Claude runs is confined to the specified filesystem and network boundaries. macOS uses Seatbelt, Linux/WSL2 uses bubblewrap. Native Windows is not supported.
settings.sandbox.enableDesc: Filesystem and network isolation for Bash commands and their child processes (Seatbelt / bubblewrap)
settings.sandbox.excludedCommandsDesc: Listed commands run outside the sandbox (e.g. docker, gh, terraform and other tools incompatible with the sandbox)
settings.sandbox.failIfUnavailableDesc: Block startup instead of falling back to non-sandboxed execution when dependencies are missing
settings.sandbox.fsIsolationDesc: Default: read the entire filesystem, write only the current working directory. Path prefixes: / (absolute), ~/ (home), ./ (project-relative)
settings.sandbox.lockDomainsDesc: Only honor allowedDomains from managed settings, ignore local config
settings.sandbox.lockReadPathsDesc: Only honor allowRead from managed settings, ignore local config
settings.sandbox.netIsolationDesc: Default: no pre-allowed domains. Prompts for approval the first time a command needs a new domain. Set allowedDomains to pre-authorize domains.
settings.sandbox.noEscapeDesc: Disable the dangerouslyDisableSandbox escape hatch; all commands must be sandboxed
settings.sandbox.unixSocketsDesc: Allow Unix domain socket access (note: Docker socket etc. may bypass the sandbox)
settings.sandbox.weakNestedDesc: Enable when running inside an unprivileged container (bind-mount /proc instead of creating a new one)
settings.sandbox.weakNetDesc: Enable for MITM proxy + custom CA scenarios
settings.title: Claude Code Settings
settings.unsavedBody: You have unsaved changes. What would you like to do before leaving this page?
skills.alignConfirm: Will make {{to}}'s enabled skills match {{from}} exactly (enable what {{from}} has, disable what {{from}} lacks).
skills.alignNoop: Both agents already match, no changes needed
skills.envMissing: npx / Node.js not detected. Install and update are unavailable. Please install Node.js first.
skills.install.emptyHint: Type a keyword to search for installable skills
skills.install.searchPlaceholder: Search skills by keyword (e.g. git, docs, deploy)
skills.install.title: Add Skills
skills.installedEmpty: No skills installed in this scope
skills.title: Skills
skills.uninstallAllConfirm: This will remove all {{count}} skills across all platforms in the current scope. This cannot be undone. Continue?
skills.uninstallConfirm: This will remove skill {{name}} and its enabled config for all agents. This cannot be undone. Confirm?
skills.uninstallGroupConfirm: This will uninstall {{count}} skill(s) under {{group}} and remove their enable config on all agents. Irreversible. Confirm?
stats.desc: View request volume and token usage by platform, group, and model
statusline.builtinDesc: Once enabled, aidog generates a script at ~/.aidog/scripts/aidog-statusline.sh
statusline.builtinSubagentDesc: Once enabled, aidog generates a script at ~/.aidog/scripts/aidog-subagent-statusline.sh
statusline.customCommandDesc: Supports absolute paths, ~ paths, or inline commands
statusline.customDesc: Fill in the native statusLine fields. Written to the settings command field; no aidog script is generated.
statusline.dataFieldsHint: Claude Code injects the following JSON fields via stdin, extractable with jq in your script
statusline.seg.added-dirs.name: Added Dirs
statusline.seg.agent-badge.desc: [type·status·model] — subagent task badge (hidden when type empty; status symbol/color dynamic)
statusline.seg.agent-badge.name: Subagent Badge
statusline.seg.agent.name: Agent Name
statusline.seg.api-duration.name: API Time
statusline.seg.context-bar.name: Context Bar
statusline.seg.context-cache.name: Cache Tokens
statusline.seg.context-max.name: Context Max

statusline.seg.context-remaining.name: Context Left
statusline.seg.context-tokens.name: Context Tokens
statusline.seg.cost-usd.name: Cost ($)
statusline.seg.cost.name: Cost Tracking
statusline.seg.custom.name: Custom
statusline.seg.cwd.name: Working Dir
statusline.seg.effort.name: Effort Level
statusline.seg.git-branch.desc: Runs git branch --show-current in-script (empty when not a git repo / no branch)
statusline.seg.git-branch.name: Git Branch
statusline.seg.git-host.name: Git Host
statusline.seg.git-owner.name: Git Owner
statusline.seg.git-repo-full.name: Git Full Name
statusline.seg.git-repo.name: Git Repo
statusline.seg.git-worktree.name: Git Worktree
statusline.seg.git.name: Git Status
statusline.seg.group-balance.desc: Estimated remaining balance of the group's single platform (single-platform groups only)
statusline.seg.group-balance.name: Group Balance
statusline.seg.group-cache.desc: Group cache hit rate (single-platform groups only)
statusline.seg.group-cache.name: Cache Rate
statusline.seg.group-coding.desc: Coding Plan tier utilization (single-platform groups only)
statusline.seg.group-coding.name: Coding Plan
statusline.seg.group-requests.desc: Group request count · success rate (single-platform groups only)

statusline.seg.group-spent.desc: Cumulative estimated spend of the current group (single-platform groups only)

statusline.seg.model.name: Model Name
statusline.seg.output-style.name: Output Style
statusline.seg.pr-number.name: PR Number
statusline.seg.pr-state.name: PR State
statusline.seg.pr-url.name: PR URL
statusline.seg.project-dir.name: Project Dir

statusline.seg.separator.name: Separator
statusline.seg.session-duration.name: Session Time
statusline.seg.session-id.name: Session ID
statusline.seg.session-name.desc: session_name — custom session name (hidden if unset)
statusline.seg.session-name.name: Session Name

statusline.seg.token-warn.name: Token Warning
statusline.seg.transcript-path.name: Transcript Path

test.title: Model Test
theme.label: Theme
tray.colorWarning: This color may be hard to read under some menu bar themes
tray.noItems: No items yet. Click the button below to add one.
group.levelPriorityHint: Higher value = higher priority (10 = highest); only effective within this group
popover.descGrid: Tray popover content — toggle, 2D drag layout, columns per row, per-card size and color.
popover.layoutHint: Tip: adding an item creates a new row; drag the top-left handle to move across/within rows; each row supports 1-3 columns.
popover.previewHint: Renders the popover with your current layout instantly — no save needed.
platform.codingUsedHint: Cumulative tokens used and estimated cost for this platform (based on actual requests)
stats.aggSettingsHint: Usage stats are accumulated independently, unaffected by the request log toggle
stats.rebuildHint: Fully rebuild the aggregate stats table from historical request logs
stats.fineGranHint: Minute-level data comes from request logs and is only available short-term (limited by log retention)
platform.share.title: Share Platform
platform.share.warning: The shared content contains a plaintext API key. Only send it to trusted recipients; never publish it publicly.
platform.share.copyFail: Copy failed, please select the content manually
platform.paste.shareDetectedHint: Click the button below to fill the full configuration (including API key) into the form.
